name: Elbow MRI
description: MRI of the elbow for ligament, tendon, and osteochondral evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the elbow was performed with T1, T2, and fat-saturated sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Collateral Ligaments
sections.content: UCL [intact / no tear]. LCL [intact / no tear].

sections.name: Tendons
sections.content: Biceps and triceps tendons [intact / no tear]. Common flexor and extensor origins [intact].

sections.name: Osteochondral
sections.content: Capitellum [no osteochondral lesion / no bone marrow edema].

impression:
1. No ligamentous injury.
2. No tendon tear.
3. Normal elbow MRI.
author: RadReport Templates
